title: show_chat_list clears three vecs without invariant comment
description: show_chat_list() in main.rs clears messages, message_bodies, and message_timestamps on chat switch (lines 71-73) but carries no comment linking this to the three-vec parallel invariant documented on AppState in app.rs. A contributor adding a fourth parallel vec would see apply_event (MessagesLoaded) as the canonical model and replicate it there, but would silently miss the second clearing site in show_chat_list(), leaving stale data in the new vec after every chat switch. Fix: add a comment to the three clear() calls in show_chat_list() stating that all parallel message vecs must be cleared here and referencing the invariant on AppState.
close_reason: Stale: chat switch now clears message_entries (one vec) not three separate parallel vecs
